MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-16-2011 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, APPLICATION OF G. SEAN JEZ TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE FOR THE PLAINTIFF JOAN HAMILTON IS OFF CALENDAR FOR DEPARTMENT 302. PER THE REPRESENTATION OF THE MOVING PARTY ON NOVEMBER 15, 2011, THIS CASE IS SINGLY ASSIGNED TO JUDGE RICHARD KRAMER AND THUS THE MOTION NEEDS TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE KRAMER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $500.00 FOR TRANSACTION W2111A13P039 (APPLICATION TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE), PAYABLE TO KNOX RICKSEN LLP, DOC #1904200194, WARRANT #38131878, DATED DEC-27-2011

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
APPLICATION OF G. SEAN JEZ TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE FOR THE PLAINTIFF JOAN HAMILTON IS Off calendar for department 302. Per the representation of the moving party on November 15, 2011, this case is singly assigned to Judge Richard Kramer and thus the motion needs to be heard by Judge Kramer.
